{{CargoOrgan
|name=Draconic Pincer
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10918
|idx=129
|description=A defiant draconic pincer that developed sentience amidst tidal fury, now convinced it can strangle the concept of destiny itself.
|skill=
|hp=3640
|def=225
|atk=270
|rush=211
|gene1=For Round 1, DMG +10%
|gene2=Each round, {race} ATK +80
|gene3=Each round, {race} RUSH +80
|gene4=Extra RUSH DMG +400
|gene5=RUSH Ignore DEF +4%
|gene6=Water DMG +120
|gene7=Per 10 Gene Seg. devoured, all ELMT DMG +12 (Awakened)
|}}
